scripts.start: npm run build && docker compose up --remove-orphans assistant_backend
scripts.install:all: npm install && npm --prefix apps/admin-frontend install && npm --prefix apps/chat-frontend install
scripts.db:migrate: docker compose run --rm assistant_backend python -m src.cli.migrate
scripts.db:seed: docker compose run --rm assistant_backend python -m src.cli.seed_admin
scripts.test:all: npm run test:api && npm run build && npm run build:chat
scripts.compose:up: npm run build && docker compose up -d --build --remove-orphans
